categories.title: Capture Validation
categories.expected: Candidate sees exam content locally; receiver capture is black, excluded, blocked, or explicitly classified as best-effort/unsupported.

categories.title: Runtime Validation
categories.expected: Runtime tick, watcher, detection, remediation, guard restart and heartbeat latency stay under configured thresholds.

categories.title: ETW Producer Validation
categories.expected: A real Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Process session emits start, stop and rundown events; TDH fields reach RuntimeStateEngine; loss is detected; restart and polling reconciliation are proven under flood.

categories.title: Fault Injection
categories.expected: Injected failure is recorded, recovery is observed, desktop/taskbar/cursor are restored, and audit evidence exists.

categories.title: Soak Test
categories.expected: No CPU, memory, handle, thread, overlay, desktop lifetime or guard health leak over the requested duration.

categories.title: Stress Test
categories.expected: Repeated start/restore, monitor, DPI, clipboard, focus, process and policy stress does not corrupt runtime state.

categories.title: Desktop Validation
categories.expected: Dedicated desktop is created before Electron, switched during exam, restored and destroyed after exit or crash.

categories.title: Service Validation
categories.expected: Installed Windows Service starts, stops, rejects stalled/flood clients and performs authorized elevated remediation.

categories.title: Benchmark Validation
categories.expected: Runtime, producer, queue, remediation and recovery latency remain under release thresholds.

windows: Ctrl+Alt+Del and UAC Secure Desktop are OS-controlled and cannot be blocked by user-mode code.
RDP attach/detach can alter session and display behavior and must be classified from evidence.
electron: Electron content protection behavior depends on OS compositor and capture path.
BrowserWindow content protection must be verified with receiver-side evidence for every supported capture stack.
wda: SetWindowDisplayAffinity is not DRM and cannot stop physical cameras, hardware capture cards, kernel drivers or future unsupported capture APIs.
WDA results vary by capture API, DWM state and Windows build.
